title: Youtube Poop: The King and the faces of Evil
description:
Link and The King are brothers! Link is a King as well! They even have the same Voice!

Unfortunatly He still has to go and face Ganon which is not happy about. King Link is scared (Kings dont do anything like combat) and just wants Dinner! He says to the Carpet Guy 'My Boy, I'm going to wee enough for all of Hyrule'.
